https://github.com/godotengine/godot/com.commit_message:
Merge pull request #114169 from YeldhamDev/really_reduce_icon_size

Fix icon resizing for `NodePath` properties not working

ranked_scenarios.summary: Reduce icon size in editor inspector NodePath properties to match design size

description.text: Previously, icons were displayed at a slightly higher size than they were designed for, which made them look blurry. ## Preview Before | After -|- |
